title: lithocardium glabrum
intro: Lithocardium glabrum, also known as Lithospermum glabrum, is a plant species in the family Boraginaceae. It is a flowering plant that has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lithocardium glabrum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve coughs and colds, and support the cardiovascular system. Lithocardium glabrum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal use.
